text.title: Cross-Tool Migration Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Cross-Tool Migration end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: discover
step.action: Inventory issues, users, attachments, fields, workflows, custom configs.

step.name: field-map
step.input: Discovery report + target tool field catalogue
step.action: Author field-map.yaml with type coercions; review with both teams.

step.name: dry-run
step.input: Field map + small subset of source data
step.action: Execute dry import into target sandbox; diff vs source; iterate until diff <0.1%.
step.decision-gate: If diff > 0.1%, fix field map and re-run.

step.name: cutover
step.action: Freeze source; export; import; switch read-write to target.
step.decision-gate: If verify_criteria fail by rollback_gate.deadline, execute rollback.

step.name: verify-and-decommission
step.action: Track issue parity, comment parity, attachment parity. If 100% at +30d, decommission source.
step.decision-gate: If parity <100% at +30d, extend soak or escalate.
